title: Buffer is accessed out of bounds: buf
evidence: Buffer is accessed out of bounds: buf

title: Obsolete function 'gets' called. It is recommended to use 'fgets' or 'gets_s' instead.
evidence: The obsolete function 'gets' is called. With 'gets' you'll get a buffer overrun if the input data exceeds the size of the buffer. It is recommended to use the functions 'fgets' or 'gets_s' instead.
